_comment: This controls the whole Portfolio section — the filter pills AND every thumbnail card. Never touch index.html to add a new thumbnail!
_comment_howTo: TO ADD A NEW THUMBNAIL: 1) Drop your image file inside assets/images/portfolio/  2) Copy one block below (the part between { and }) and paste it inside the 'items' list  3) Change 'image' to your file's path  4) Change 'category' to whatever group it belongs to (type a NEW category name and a new filter pill appears automatically — you never need to edit any pill by hand)  5) 'link' is optional — only add it if this thumbnail should open an outside link (like the finished YouTube video). Delete the whole 'link' line if you don't need it.
